user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable employee confirmation questions via the configuration toggle, so that confirmation questionnaires are used in the process
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Confirmation Questions screen; When I set "Do you perform employee confirmation questions ?" to Yes and Save; Then the questionnaire configuration is enabled

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new confirmation question with type, options, score and display order, so that I can build the confirmation questionnaire
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Confirmation Questions screen; When I click Add new question and enter Value, Description, Score and Display Order then Save; Then the question is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view questions with their attributes such as question type, mandatory flag and question category, so that I can review the questionnaire setup
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Confirmation Questions screen; When the list loads; Then each question shows Question, Question type, Employee class specific, Options, Is mandatory, Is confirmation question, Is peer review question and Is periodic confirmation question

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to preview the confirmation, peer review and periodic confirmation questionnaires, so that I can verify how they appear before use
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Confirmation Questions screen; When I click Preview confirmation questionnaire, Preview peer review questionnaire or Preview periodic confirmation questionnaire; Then the corresponding questionnaire preview is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing question, so that I can keep the questionnaire content up to date
acceptance_criteria: Given a question is listed; When I click Edit on that row and change its details then Save; Then the updated question is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to organize questions by type, so that the questionnaire is structured logically
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Confirmation Questions screen; When I use Organize Questions Type; Then questions are grouped and ordered by their type

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the questions list, so that I see the latest saved questions
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Confirmation Questions screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
